steps.title: Identify ranges with 17 or more complete years
steps.content:
Looking at the table, the ranges representing 17 or more complete years are:
  • 17 to 20: 16 employees
  • 21 to 24: 7 employees
  • 25 to 28: 8 employees

steps.title: Sum the employee counts
steps.content: Add the counts from those three ranges: $$16 + 7 + 8 = 31$$ Therefore, 31 of the 73 employees have worked at the company for 17 or more complete years.
